environment.postgres_version: PostgreSQL 16.14 (Ubuntu 16.14-1.pgdg24.04+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Ubuntu 13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04.1) 13.3.0, 64-bit

pg_settings.name: primary_conninfo
pg_settings.setting: dbname=postgres user=replicator passfile=/var/lib/postgresql/pgpass host=192.168.88.103 port=5432 sslmode=prefer application_name=node2 gssencmode=prefer channel_binding=prefer

environment.patroni_dynamic_config:
loop_wait: 10
maximum_lag_on_failover: 1048576
postgresql:
  parameters:
    effective_cache_size: 3GB
    effective_io_concurrency: 16
    maintenance_work_mem: 256MB
    max_connections: 200
    max_wal_size: 2GB
    pg_stat_statements.track: all
    random_page_cost: 1.1
    shared_buffers: 1GB
    shared_preload_libraries: pg_stat_statements
    track_activity_query_size: 2048
    track_io_timing: true
    wal_log_hints: true
    work_mem: 16MB
  use_pg_rewind: true
  use_slots: true
retry_timeout: 10
synchronous_mode: false
ttl: 30
environment.pgpool_params:
sr_check_period = 5
health_check_period = 5
health_check_timeout = 5
health_check_max_retries = 2
load_balance_mode = on
num_init_children = 32
max_pool = 4
failover_on_backend_error = off
auto_failback = on
search_primary_node_timeout = 60

scenario.name: Baseline — Mixed Load
scenario.description: Balanced 5:1 read/write, no failures. Establishes TPS baseline.

scenario.name: Baseline — Read Heavy
scenario.description: 20:1 read/write with 8-table JOIN. Tests standby read scalability.

scenario.name: Baseline — Write Heavy
scenario.description: 5:1 write/read CTE chains. Drives the primary's write path.

scenario.name: HA — Leader Crash (A1)
scenario.description: SIGKILL the current Patroni leader under probe load. Leader is moved off the proxy node first, so this measures pure DB failover (etcd TTL expiry → election → promote → PgPool reroute).

errors.error:
OperationalError('FATAL:  unable to read data from DB node 1
DETAIL:  EOF encountered with backend
server closed the connection unexpectedly
	This probably means the server terminated abnormally
	before or while processing the request.
')

OperationalError('server closed the connection unexpectedly
	This probably means the server terminated abnormally
	before or while processing the request.
')

scenario.name: HA — Planned Switchover (A6)
scenario.description: patronictl switchover (graceful, coordinated demote+promote). The HA best case: expects RTO of a few seconds, zero data loss.

inject_resolved.name: switchover-inject
inject_resolved.command: ssh node1 sudo patronictl -c /etc/patroni/config.yml switchover pgcluster --force
inject_resolved.label: switchover-inject: ssh node1 sudo patronictl -c /etc/patroni/config.yml switchover pgcluster --force

errors.error:
OperationalError('FATAL:  unable to read data from DB node 2
DETAIL:  EOF encountered with backend
server closed the connection unexpectedly
	This probably means the server terminated abnormally
	before or while processing the request.
')
OperationalError('FATAL:  failed to create a backend 2 connection\nDETAIL:  not executing failover because failover_on_backend_error is off\n')

scenario.name: HA — Replica Power-Off (A2)
scenario.description: SIGKILL a streaming replica (not the leader, not the proxy node). Writes should be unaffected; PgPool detaches the dead reader.
